mapper.sql: id, table_id, column_name, column_type, column_comment, java_type, java_field_name, is_pk, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, query_form_type, form_type, form_dict_code, is_required, is_unique, max_length, sort, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_codegen_field_info WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_codegen_field_info ( id, table_id, column_name, column_type, column_comment, java_type, java_field_name, is_pk, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, query_form_type, form_type, form_dict_code, is_required, is_unique, max_length, sort, create_time, delete_flag ) VALUES
(#{field.id}, #{field.tableId}, #{field.columnName}, #{field.columnType}, #{field.columnComment}, #{field.javaType}, #{field.javaFieldName}, #{field.isPk}, #{field.isInsert}, #{field.isEdit}, #{field.isList}, #{field.isQuery}, #{field.queryType}, #{field.queryFormType}, #{field.formType}, #{field.formDictCode}, #{field.isRequired}, #{field.isUnique}, #{field.maxLength}, #{field.sort}, #{field.createTime}, 0)
